name: Card Miner
short_description: Card Miner is a card collector game, where you collect different anthropomorphic monster gals (as cards). Each one has unique information, including stats, likes, dislikes, and abilities. Collect them and Battle them!
detailed_description:
If you have ever wanted to collect a bunch of monster-girls

as collectible trading cards uh...here you go!
________________________________________________
There's nothing weird about it at all, just click on the

big card on the left to pull from the infinite deck, and

try to collect every. single. one.

________________________________________________
Watch out though, there is a potential negative card that

could appear, so try to collect them before you lose

some of your points or collection!

________________________________________________
Also, you can buy cards with points and the buy

button in the upper-right!
________________________________________________

On top of that, there is a 'Battle Mode' which is kind of like Poker, but

different! Make sure you try to play against the Bosses!

________________________________________________
Thanks for reading and playing, and have fun!
